title: Project: build a log analyzer
body: You've got the fundamentals. Now you'll build a *real tool* — a log analyzer, the exact thing a security analyst reaches for to find trouble in a flood of log lines. Each step adds one working piece, and as you pass each one it gets written into a real file at `projects/logparser/`. By the end you'll have a script that runs on your own machine. Let's build it.
